slides.title: God's Love
slides.verse: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

slides.title: The Sin Problem
slides.verse: For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God, and all are justified freely by his grace through the redemption that came by Christ Jesus.

slides.title: Jesus, The Solution
slides.verse: But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.

slides.title: Faith Response
slides.verse: For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith — and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God — not by works, so that no one can boast.

slides.title: New Life in Christ
slides.verse: Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: The old has gone, the new is here!

slides.title: The Trinity
slides.verse: Go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.

slides.title: God's Word
slides.verse: All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness.

slides.title: Suffering & Hope
slides.verse: And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him, who have been called according to his purpose.

slides.title: The Only Way
slides.verse: Jesus answered, 'I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.'

slides.title: Prayer of Salvation
slides.verse: If you declare with your mouth, 'Jesus is Lord,' and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved.

slides.title: The Holy Spirit
slides.verse: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you; and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth.

slides.title: Great Commission
slides.verse: Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.

slides.title: Love Your Neighbor
slides.verse: 'Love the Lord your God with all your heart... Love your neighbor as yourself.' All the Law and the Prophets hang on these two commandments.

slides.title: Forgiveness
slides.verse: Be kind and compassionate to one another, forgiving each other, just as in Christ God forgave you.

slides.title: Eternal Hope
slides.verse: For I am convinced that neither death nor life, neither angels nor demons... nor anything else in all creation, will be able to separate us from the love of God.

god-love.en: God's love is unconditional and sacrificial. John 3:16 shows that God loved the world so much He gave His only Son.
god-love.fr: L'amour de Dieu est inconditionnel. Jean 3:16 montre que Dieu a tant aimé le monde qu'il a donné son Fils unique.
god-love.yo: Ife Olorun ko ni opin. Johannu 3:16 fihan pe Olorun feran aye to to fi Ọmọ rẹ kanṣoṣo fun.
god-love.ig: Ịhụnanya Chineke enweghị atụ. Jọn 3:16 na-egosi na Chineke hụrụ ụwa n'anya nke ukwuu.
god-love.ha: Ƙaunar Allah ba ta da iyaka. Yahaya 3:16 ya nuna cewa Allah ya ƙaunaci duniya har ya ba da Ɗansa.
god-love.pcm: God love no get end. John 3:16 show say God love di world well well.
god-love.sw: Upendo wa Mungu hauna masharti. Yohana 3:16 inaonyesha kwamba Mungu aliupenda ulimwengu.
god-love.ar: محبة الله غير مشروطة. يوحنا ٣:١٦ تظهر أن الله أحب العالم حتى بذل ابنه الوحيد.

sin-problem.en: Sin is anything that falls short of God's perfect standard. Romans 3:23 reminds us that all have sinned and need a Savior.
sin-problem.fr: Le péché est tout ce qui est en dessous de la norme parfaite de Dieu. Romains 3:23 nous rappelle que tous ont péché.
sin-problem.yo: Ẹṣẹ jẹ ohun ti o kere si iwuwasi pipe Ọlọrun. Romani 3:23 fi hàn pe gbogbo eniyan ti ṣẹ.
sin-problem.ig: Mmehie bụ ihe ọ bụla na-adịghị iru ọkọlọtọ Chineke zuru oke. Rom 3:23 na-egosi na onye ọ bụla mere mmehie.
sin-problem.ha: Zunubi shine komai da ya gaza ma'aunin Allah na cikakke. Romani 3:23 ya tuna mana cewa duka sun yi zunubi.
sin-problem.pcm: Sin na everitin wey no reach God standard. Romans 3:23 remind us say everybody don sin.
sin-problem.sw: Dhambi ni chochote kinachopungukia kiwango kamili cha Mungu. Warumi 3:23 inakumbusha kwamba wote wametenda dhambi.
sin-problem.ar: الخطية هي كل ما يقصر عن معيار الله الكامل. رومية ٣:٢٣ تذكرنا أن الجميع أخطأوا.

jesus-solution.en: Jesus is God's solution to our sin problem. While we were still sinners, Christ died for us (Romans 5:8).
jesus-solution.fr: Jésus est la solution de Dieu à notre problème de péché. Alors que nous étions encore pécheurs, Christ est mort pour nous.
jesus-solution.yo: Jesu ni ojutu Ọlọrun si isoro ẹṣẹ wa. Kristi ku fun wa lakoko ti awa n jẹ awọn ẹlẹṣẹ.
jesus-solution.ig: Jizọs bụ ihe ọgwụ Chineke maka nsogbu mmehie anyị. Kraịst nwụọ n'ihi anyị mgbe anyị ka bụ ndị mmehie.
jesus-solution.ha: Yesu shine mafita ta Allah don matsalar zunubin mu. Kristi ya mutu dominmu muna cikin zunubai.
jesus-solution.pcm: Jesus na God solution to our sin wahala. Christ die for us when we still dey sin.
jesus-solution.sw: Yesu ni suluhisho la Mungu kwa tatizo letu la dhambi. Kristo alikufa kwa ajili yetu tulipokuwa bado wadhambi.
jesus-solution.ar: يسوع هو حل الله لمشكلة خطيتنا. مات المسيح لأجلنا ونحن بعد خطاة.

faith-response.en: Faith is trusting in Jesus alone for salvation. Ephesians 2:8-9 clarifies that salvation is by grace through faith, not by works.
faith-response.fr: La foi, c'est faire confiance à Jésus seul pour le salut. Éphésiens 2:8-9 précise que le salut est par grâce au moyen de la foi.
faith-response.yo: Igbagbọ ni igbẹkẹle Jesu nikan fun igbala. Efesu 2:8-9 sọ pe igbala wa nipasẹ ore-ọfẹ nipasẹ igbagbọ.
faith-response.ig: Okwukwe bụ ịtụkwasị obi na Jizọs naanị maka ọzọ nzọpụta. Efe 2:8-9 na-ekwuo na ọzọ nzọpụta sitere n'ùgwù site n'okwukwe.
faith-response.ha: Bangaskiya ita ce dogaro ga Yesu kadai don ceto. Afisawa 2:8-9 ya bayyana cewa ceto yana ta alheri ta hanyar bangaskiya.
faith-response.pcm: Faith na trust Yesu only for salvation. Ephesians 2:8-9 clear say salvation na by grace through faith, not by work.
faith-response.sw: Imani ni kumwamini Yesu peke yake kwa wokovu. Waefeso 2:8-9 inabainisha kwamba wokovu ni kwa neema kupitia imani.
faith-response.ar: الإيمان هو الثقة في يسوع وحده للخلاص. أفسس ٢:٨-٩ يوضح أن الخلاص بالنعمة بالإيمان لا بالأعمال.

new-life.en: When we accept Jesus, we become new creations. 2 Corinthians 5:17 promises that the old has gone and the new is here.
new-life.fr: Quand nous acceptons Jésus, nous devenons de nouvelles créatures. 2 Corinthiens 5:17 promet que l'ancien est passé.
new-life.yo: Nigba ti a gba Jesu, a di ẹda titun. 2 Korinti 5:17 ṣe ileri pe ohun atijọ ti lọ.
new-life.ig: Mgbe anyị na-anabata Jizọs, anyị na-aghọ ọhụrụ. 2 Kọr 5:17 na-ekwe nkwa na ihe ochie agafeela.
new-life.ha: Sa'ad da muka karbi Yesu, muna zama sabbin halittu. 2 Korintiyawa 5:17 yana alkawari cewa tsohon ya wuce.
new-life.pcm: When we accept Jesus, we become new creature. 2 Corinthians 5:17 promise say the old don go.
new-life.sw: Tunapomkubali Yesu, tunakuwa viumbe vipya. 2 Wakorintho 5:17 inadhihirisha kwamba ya zamani imepita.
new-life.ar: عندما نقبل يسوع، نصبح خليقة جديدة. ٢كورنثوس ٥:١٧ يعد بأن القديم قد مضى وها الجديد قد جاء.

trinity.en: The Trinity is the Christian doctrine that God exists as three distinct Persons — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — who are one God.
trinity.fr: La Trinité est la doctrine chrétienne selon laquelle Dieu existe en trois Personnes distinctes — Père, Fils et Saint-Esprit — qui sont un seul Dieu.
trinity.yo: Mẹtalọkan ni ẹkọ Kristian pe Ọlọrun wa gẹgẹbi eniyan mẹta ọtọọtọ — Baba, Ọmọ, ati Ẹmí Mimọ.
trinity.ig: Ụlọ Atọ bụ nkuzi Krist na Chineke dị ka mmadụ atọ dị iche iche — Nna, Ọkpara, na Mmụọ Nsọ.
trinity.ha: Triniti shine koyarwar Kirista cewa Allah yana wanzuwa a matsayin mutane uku daban-daban — Uba, Ɗa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki.
trinity.pcm: Trinity na di Christian teaching say God exist as three different Person — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.
trinity.sw: Utatu Mtakatifu ni fundisho la Kikristo kwamba Mungu yupo kama Watu watatu tofauti — Baba, Mwana, na Roho Mtakatifu.
trinity.ar: الثالوث هو عقيدة مسيحية بأن الله موجود كثلاثة أقانيم متمايزة — الآب والابن والروح القدس.

scripture.en: The Bible is God's inspired, authoritative Word — completely true and reliable. 2 Timothy 3:16 teaches that all Scripture is God-breathed.
scripture.fr: La Bible est la Parole inspirée et faisant autorité de Dieu — complètement vraie et fiable.
scripture.yo: Bibeli jẹ Ọrọ Ọlọrun ti a fà simi, ni aṣẹ — ootọ patapata ati igbẹkẹle. 2 Timoteu 3:16 kọ pe gbogbo iwe-mimọ jẹ ìmísí Ọlọrun.
scripture.ig: Baịbụl bụ Okwu Chineke nke atụfuo, nke nwere ọchịchọ — ziri ezi kpamkpam. 2 Tim 3:16 na-akụzi na ihe niile edere n'akwụkwọ nsọ sitere n'ụmị Chineke.
scripture.ha: Littafi Mai Tsarki shine Maganar Allah mai wahayi, mai iko — daidai gaba ɗaya kuma mai aminci.
scripture.pcm: Bible na God inspired, authoritative Word — completely true and reliable.
scripture.sw: Biblia ni Neno la Mungu lililovuviwa, lenye mamlaka — kweli kabisa na linaloaminika.
scripture.ar: الكتاب المقدس هو كلمة الله الملهمة ذات السلطة — صادقة تماماً وموثوقة.

suffering.en: God doesn't promise a life without suffering, but He promises to be with us in it. Romans 8:28 assures us that all things work together for good.
suffering.fr: Dieu ne promet pas une vie sans souffrance, mais Il promet d'être avec nous dans la souffrance. Romains 8:28 nous assure que toutes choses concourent au bien.
suffering.yo: Ọlọrun ko ṣe ileri igbesi aye laisi ijiya, ṣugbọn O ṣe ileri lati wa pẹlu wa. Romani 8:28 da wa lójú pé gbogbo nkan n ṣiṣẹ papọ fun rere.
suffering.ig: Chineke anaghị ekwe nkwa ndụ na-enweghị ịta ahụ̀, mana o kwenyere ịnọ anyị n'oge ahụ. Rom 8:28 na-egosi na ihe niile na-arụkọ ọrụ ọma.
suffering.ha: Allah baya alkawari rayuwa ba tare da wahala ba, amma Yana alkawarin zama tare da mu a ciki. Romani 8:28 ya tabbatar da mu.
suffering.pcm: God no promise say life go be without suffering, but He promise to dey with us. Romans 8:28 assure us say all things work for good.
suffering.sw: Mungu haahidi maisha bila mateso, lakini anaahidi kuwepo nasi ndani yake. Warumi 8:28 inatuhakikishia kwamba vitu vyote vinafanya kazi pamoja kwa wema.
suffering.ar: الله لا يعد بحياة بلا معاناة، لكنه يعد بأن يكون معنا فيها. رومية ٨:٢٨ يطمئننا أن كل الأشياء تعمل معاً للخير.

only-way.en: Jesus is the exclusive way to God because He alone is both fully God and fully human — the only mediator between God and humanity.
only-way.fr: Jésus est le seul chemin vers Dieu parce qu'Il est à la fois pleinement Dieu et pleinement humain — le seul médiateur entre Dieu et l'humanité.
only-way.yo: Jesu ni ọna kanṣoṣo si Ọlọrun nitori pe Oun nikan ni Ọlọrun ni kikun ati eniyan ni kikun.
only-way.ig: Jizọs bụ ụzọ naanị gaa n'ebe Chineke n'ihi na naanị ya bụ Chineke kpamkpam ma bụruo mmadụ kpamkpam.
only-way.ha: Yesu shine hanyar musamman zuwa ga Allah saboda Shi kaɗai ne cikakken Allah kuma cikakken ɗan adam.
only-way.pcm: Jesus na di only way to God because He alone na fully God and fully human — only mediator.
only-way.sw: Yesu ndiye njia pekee kwenda kwa Mungu kwa sababu yeye peke yake ni Mungu kamili na mwanadamu kamili.
only-way.ar: يسوع هو الطريق الحصري إلى الله لأنه وحده إله كامل وإنسان كامل — الوسيط الوحيد.

salvation-prayer.en: The prayer of salvation is a simple confession of faith in Jesus. Romans 10:9 says: confess with your mouth and believe in your heart.
salvation-prayer.fr: La prière du salut est une simple confession de foi en Jésus. Romains 10:9 dit : confesse de ta bouche et crois dans ton cœur.
salvation-prayer.yo: Adura igbala jẹ ijẹwọ igbagbọ ti o rọrun ninu Jesu. Romani 10:9 sọ: jẹwọ pẹlu ẹnu rẹ ki o si gbagbọ ninu ọkàn rẹ.
salvation-prayer.ig: Ekpere nzọpụta bụ nkwupụta okwukwe dị mfe na Jizọs. Rom 10:9 na-ekwu: kwụpụta n'ọnụ gị ma kwene n'obi gị.
salvation-prayer.ha: Addu'ar ceto ita ce sauƙaƙƙiyar ikirari na bangaskiya ga Yesu. Romani 10:9 ya ce: furta da bakinku kuma ku gaskata a zukatanku.
salvation-prayer.pcm: Prayer of salvation na simple confession of faith in Jesus. Romans 10:9 say: confess with your mouth and believe in your heart.
salvation-prayer.sw: Sala ya wokovu ni kukiri kwa unyoofu imani katika Yesu. Warumi 10:9 inasema: ikiri kwa mdomo wako na uamini moyoni mwako.
salvation-prayer.ar: صلاة الخلاص هي اعتراف بسيط بالإيمان بيسوع. رومية ١٠:٩ تقول: اعترف بفمك وآمن بقلبك.

holy-spirit.en: The Holy Spirit is God's presence in believers, empowering us for holy living and witness. Acts 1:8 promises power when the Spirit comes.
holy-spirit.fr: Le Saint-Esprit est la présence de Dieu dans les croyants, nous donnant le pouvoir pour une vie sainte et un témoignage.
holy-spirit.yo: Ẹmí Mimọ ni iwaju Ọlọrun ninu awọn olugbagbọ, ni fifún wa ni agbara fun igbesi aye mimo.
holy-spirit.ig: Mmụọ Nsọ bụ ọnụnọ Chineke n'ime ndị kwere, na-enye anyị ike maka ndụ nsọ na àkà.
holy-spirit.ha: Ruhu Mai Tsarki shine kasancewar Allah a cikin masu bi, yana ba mu ƙarfi don rayuwa mai tsarki.
holy-spirit.pcm: Holy Spirit na God presence inside believers, empowering us for holy living. Acts 1:8 promise power.
holy-spirit.sw: Roho Mtakatifu ni uwepo wa Mungu katika waamini, akitupa nguvu za maisha ya utakatifu na ushuhuda.
holy-spirit.ar: الروح القدس هو حضور الله في المؤمنين، يمكّننا للعيش القدوس والشهادة. أعمال ١:٨ يعد بالقوة.

great-commission.en: The Great Commission is Jesus' final command to make disciples of all nations, baptizing and teaching them to obey His commands.
great-commission.fr: La Grande Commission est le commandement final de Jésus de faire des disciples de toutes les nations, en les baptisant et en leur enseignant.
great-commission.yo: Àṣẹ Nla ni àṣẹ ikẹhìn Jesu lati ṣe awọn ọmọ-ẹkọ ti gbogbo orilẹ-ède, ti n ṣe baptisi wọn.
great-commission.ig: Àjà Maka Ụwa niile bụ nkwụsịtụ ikpeazụ Jizọs ileta ụmụ akwụkwọ n'ime mba niile, na-abatịzi ha.
great-commission.ha: Babbar Hukuma ita ce ƙarshen umarni na Yesu na yi almajiran al'ummai duka, suna yi musu baftisma.
great-commission.pcm: Great Commission na Jesus final command to make disciples of all nations, baptize and teach them.
great-commission.sw: Agizo Kuu ni amri ya mwisho ya Yesu kufanya wanafunzi katika mataifa yote, kuwabatiza na kuwafundisha.
great-commission.ar: الوصية العظيمة هي أمر يسوع الأخير لتلمذة جميع الأمم وتعميدهم وتعليمهم.

love-neighbor.en: Loving your neighbor means actively showing God's love to others through practical acts of service, kindness, and forgiveness.
love-neighbor.fr: Aimer son prochain signifie montrer activement l'amour de Dieu aux autres par des actes pratiques de service, de bonté et de pardon.
love-neighbor.yo: Ifi ẹlẹgbẹ rẹ lẹ tumọ si ṣiṣe afihan ife Ọlọrun ni itara si awọn ẹlomiiran nipasẹ awọn iṣẹ iṣe ti iṣẹ, inure, ati idariji.
love-neighbor.ig: Ịhụnanya agbataobi gị pụtara igosi ịhụnanya Chineke nye ndị ọzọ site n'ọrụ ọzizi, ebere, na ịgbaghara.
love-neighbor.ha: Ƙaunar maƙwabcinka na nufin nuna ƙaunar Allah ga wasu ta hanyar ayyuka na zahiri na hidima, alheri da gafara.
love-neighbor.pcm: Love your neighbor mean you go show God love to others through practical service, kindness, and forgiveness.
love-neighbor.sw: Kupenda jirani yako kunamaanisha kuonyesha kwa vitendo upendo wa Mungu kwa wengine kupitia huduma na huruma.
love-neighbor.ar: محبة قريبك تعني إظهار محبة الله للآخرين بشكل فعال من خلال أعمال الخدمة والطيبة والمغفرة.

forgiveness.en: Forgiveness is releasing resentment toward someone who has wronged you, just as God forgave you in Christ. Ephesians 4:32.
forgiveness.fr: Le pardon, c'est libérer le ressentiment envers quelqu'un qui vous a fait du tort, tout comme Dieu vous a pardonné en Christ.
forgiveness.yo: Idariji ni itusilẹ ibinu si ẹnikan ti o ṣe aṣiṣe si ọ, gẹgẹ bi Ọlọrun ti dariji rẹ ninu Kristi.
forgiveness.ig: Ịgbaghara bụ ịhapụ iwe n'afu onye mere gị ihe ọjọọ, dị ka Chineke gbaghaara gị na Kraịst.
forgiveness.ha: Gafara ita ce sakin fushi ga wanda ya yi maka laifi, kamar yadda Allah ya gafarta maka a cikin Kristi.
forgiveness.pcm: Forgiveness na release the grudge against person wey wrong you, just like God forgive you in Christ.
forgiveness.sw: Msamaha ni kuacha chuki dhidi ya mtu aliyekukosea, kama vile Mungu alivyokusamehe katika Kristo.
forgiveness.ar: المغفرة هي إطلاق سراح الاستياء تجاه من أساء إليك، كما أن الله غفر لك في المسيح.

eternal-hope.en: Eternal hope is the confident expectation of God's promises for the future, including resurrection and eternal life. Romans 8:38-39.
eternal-hope.fr: L'espérance éternelle est l'attente confiante des promesses de Dieu pour l'avenir, y compris la résurrection et la vie éternelle.
eternal-hope.yo: Ireti ayérayé ni ireti igbẹkẹle ti awọn ileri Ọlọrun fun ọjọ iwaju, pẹlu àjinde ati igbesi aye ayérayé.
eternal-hope.ig: Olileanya ebighi ebi bụ atụmanya na nkwa Chineke maka ọdịnihu, gụnyere mbilite n'ọnwụ na ndụ ebighi ebi.
eternal-hope.ha: Bege na gaba shine tsammanin amintattu na alkawuran Allah na gaba, gami da tashin matattu da rayuwa ta har abada.
eternal-hope.pcm: Eternal hope na the confident expectation of God promises for future including resurrection and eternal life.
eternal-hope.sw: Tumaini la milele ni matarajio ya ujasiri ya ahadi za Mungu kwa siku zijazo, ikiwa ni pamoja na ufufuo na uzima wa milele.
eternal-hope.ar: الرجاء الأبدي هو التوقع الواثق لمواعيد الله للمستقبل، بما في ذلك القيامة والحياة الأبدية.

dailyVerses.verse: The LORD is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
I can do all this through him who gives me strength.
Trust in the LORD with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
For I know the plans I have for you, declares the LORD, plans to prosper you and not to harm you.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the LORD your God will be with you.
The name of the LORD is a fortified tower; the righteous run to it and are safe.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
